query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_pagos,
  SUM(CAST(amount AS DECIMAL(15,2))) as total_monto,
  movementType,
  type
FROM payments
GROUP BY movementType, type
ORDER BY total_monto DESC
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bxEETtHLyojAa4.root --database XhEkCr8yXcaeDFyuQebdJQ --execute SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_pagos,
  SUM(CAST(amount AS DECIMAL(15,2))) as total_monto,
  movementType,
  type
FROM payments
GROUP BY movementType, type
ORDER BY total_monto DESC
